28: The script defines an Agent named fastmcp_greeter_agent that uses a Gemini
29: language model. It's given a specific instruction to act as a friendly assistant whose
30: purpose is to greet people. Crucially, the code equips this agent with a tool to perform
31: its task. It configures an MCPToolset to connect to a separate server running on
32: localhost:8000, which is expected to be the FastMCP server from the previous
33: example. The agent is specifically granted access to the greet tool hosted on that
34: server. In essence, this code sets up the client side of the system, creating an
35: intelligent agent that understands its goal is to greet people and knows exactly which
36: external tool to use to accomplish it.
